# Study Protocol — AI Tool Adoption Survey (IRB-2024-001)

**Data collection:** Online survey distributed to programme coordinators.
**Identifiers collected:** Institutional email (for follow-up interview invitation),
programme name, and respondent role.
**Retention:** Identified data held for 12 months post-project-close.
**Consent script** drafted by `research_architect_agent` (survey designer mode).
